stemHtml:
Refer to figure or AMSTERDAM - Chart 10-2B from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017. You enter the STAR via MOLIX, after which you decide to hold at SUGOL for 20 mins. Given the following information, how much fuel do you burn between MOLIX and leaving the hold to commence the procedure?

TAS: 250 kt
Fuel flow in cruise: 3000 kg/h
Holding fuel flow: 2400 kg/h
Nil Wind
